text.title: GraphQL API Design Worked Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example for the graphql-api-design methodology.

example.title: Payment mutation with userErrors + @auth
example.narrative: Schema captures payments aggregate. createPayment(input: CreatePaymentInput!): CreatePaymentPayload @auth(scope: PAYMENTS_WRITE). CreatePaymentPayload { payment: Payment, userErrors: [UserError!]!}. UserError { field, message, code }. Payment.author resolves to User via opaque ID (gid://app/User/abc). PaymentConnection used for paginated lists. Schema diff gate green; @auth directive coverage report shows 100% on mutations + sensitive fields. Migration from a legacy Boolean-return createPayment uses field deprecation with target removal in v2.0.
example.artifact: schema.graphql + auth-map.md + naming-audit.json with 100% directive coverage.
